name: Color Accent
description: Accent color for Therapy. Used as primary button background, hero area background, and as a link color. This color provides accessible contrast when used for text on light background.

name: Color Accent Strong
description: Used for theming purposes. Created from Color Accent by lowering lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Accent Weak
description: Used for theming purposes. Created from Color Accent by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Text
description: Default text color. Used as the main text color throughout the UI. Provides good and legible contrast for our content.

name: Color Text Strong
description: Created from Color Text by lowering lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Text Weak
description: Created from Color Text by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Text Neutral
description: Created from Color Text by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor times 5 and reducing saturation component to 0.

name: Color Background
description: Default color for app background.

name: Color Border Panel
description: Default background color for panel component.

name: Color Background Panel
description: Default border color for panel component.

name: Color Text Button
description: Default button text color.

name: Color Text Button Inverted
description: Default button inverted text color.

name: Color Background Button
description: Default background color for button. Initially matches Color Accent.

name: Color Background Button Strong
description: Created from Color Background Button by decreasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Background Button Weak
description: Created from Color Background Button by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value..

name: Color Text Nav
description: Default color for navigation links.

name: Color Background Nav
description: Default background color for navigation links.

name: Color Background Nav Strong
description: Created from Color Background Nav by decreasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Background Nav Weak
description: Created from Color Background Nav by decreasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Text Nav Active
description: Default active color for navigation links.

name: Color Status Warning
description: Default color for warning messages.

name: Color Status Warning Weak
description: Created from Color Status Warning by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Status Warning Strong
description: Created from Color Status Warning by decreasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Status Error
description: Default color for error messages.

name: Color Status Error Weak
description: Created from Color Status Error by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Status Error Strong
description: Created from Color Status Error by decreasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Status Success
description: Default color for success messages.

name: Color Status Success Weak
description: Created from Color Status Success by increasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Status Success Strong
description: Created from Color Status Success by decreasing lightness by --ts-color-lightness-factor value.

name: Color Status Neutral
description: Default color for neutral messages.

name: Color Overlay
description: Default color for overlays.

name: Color Shadow
description: Default base color for box shadows.

name: Border Radius CIRCLE

example: 50%

name: Line height: NONE
description: This token can be used when you want to e.g. align text & icons
example:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sit amet bibendum ligula. Praesent non magna quis lectus interdum eleifend eget et justo. Nulla ac pretium lacus. Cras dignissim nisi eu volutpat rhoncus.

1

name: Line height: TIGHT
description: This token can be used when you don’t want line height taking any extra space.
example:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sit amet bibendum ligula. Praesent non magna quis lectus interdum eleifend eget et justo. Nulla ac pretium lacus. Cras dignissim nisi eu volutpat rhoncus.

1.15

name: Line height: HEADING
description: This is the default line height for headings.
example:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sit amet bibendum ligula. Praesent non magna quis lectus interdum eleifend eget et justo. Nulla ac pretium lacus. Cras dignissim nisi eu volutpat rhoncus.

1.2

name: Line height: FORM
description: This is the default line height for form inputs, textareas and buttons.
example:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sit amet bibendum ligula. Praesent non magna quis lectus interdum eleifend eget et justo. Nulla ac pretium lacus. Cras dignissim nisi eu volutpat rhoncus.

1.25

name: Line height: CAPTION
description: This is the default line height for captions, hint texts and form errors.
example:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sit amet bibendum ligula. Praesent non magna quis lectus interdum eleifend eget et justo. Nulla ac pretium lacus. Cras dignissim nisi eu volutpat rhoncus.

1.3

name: Line height: DEFAULT
description: This is the default line height for body text.
example:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec sit amet bibendum ligula. Praesent non magna quis lectus interdum eleifend eget et justo. Nulla ac pretium lacus. Cras dignissim nisi eu volutpat rhoncus.

1.5

name: Z-index: DEEP
description: Deep z-index is used to stack something behind everything else.
example: -999999

name: Z-index: DEFAULT
description: The default z-index for components and elements inside components.
example: 1

name: Z-index: MASKED
description: Default z-index for masked interface elements.
example: 100

name: Z-index: MASK
description: Default z-index for masking interface elements.
example: 200

name: Z-index: STICKY
description: Default z-index for sticky interface elements.
example: 300

name: Z-index: NAVIGATION
description: Default z-index for navigation.
example: 400

name: Z-index: TOP BAR
description: Default z-index for top bar.
example: 500

name: Z-index: OVERLAY
description: Default z-index for modal and popup overlays.
example: 600

name: Z-index: SPINNER
description: Default z-index for spinners, stacking on top of overlay.
example: 700

name: Z-index: POPOUT
description: Default z-index for popouts that stacks on top of all other elements.
example: 800

name: Z-index: TOAST
description: Default z-index for toast messages.
example: 900

name: Z-index: MODAL
description: Default z-index for modals that stacks on top of overlays and other elements, but still allows popups to be visible.
example: 1000
